initiative.description: At the start of combat, each participant makes an initiative check. Roll 1d20 and add your initiative bonus (Dex modifier + Improved Initiative feat if you have it).
initiative.dc: Highest roll acts first, ties act simultaneously
initiative.order: Combat proceeds in order from highest to lowest initiative
initiative.round: Each round represents 6 seconds of action

attackRolls.attackBonus: Base attack bonus (from class/level) + ability modifier (Str for melee/Dex for ranged) + special bonuses (enchantment, feats, etc.)

criticalHit.description: When an attack roll equals or exceeds the critical threat range, roll again
criticalHit.confirmation: Roll another attack. If it hits, multiply damage by critical multiplier

meleeBonuses.strengthBonus: Add full Str modifier to damage
meleeBonuses.dexterityBonus: Dex modifier does NOT apply to melee damage
meleeBonuses.size: Larger weapons may have damage die steps based on creature size

rangedBonuses.strengthBonus: Add half Str modifier to damage (if using Composite bow)
rangedBonuses.dexterityBonus: Dex modifier does NOT apply to ranged damage normally
rangedBonuses.pointBlank: +1 to hit and damage if within 30 feet (Pointblank Shot feat)

damageRolls.minimumDamage: Minimum of 1 damage per weapon, even if modifiers reduce it below 1
damageRolls.multipleAttacks: If making multiple attacks (iterative attacks or two-weapon fighting), each attack rolls damage separately
damageRolls.sneakAttack: Add sneak attack damage (+1d6 per 2 rogue levels, starting at 1d6 at level 1) when target is denied its Dexterity bonus to AC or when flanked
damageRolls.conditionsForEffect: Target must be denied DEX bonus to AC (flat-footed, blinded, stunned, etc.) or flanked by the rogue and an ally. Ranged sneak attacks only work within 30 feet. Creatures immune to critical hits are immune to sneak attack.

savingThrows.formula: 1d20 + save bonus (half ability modifier, rounded down) + Wisdom modifier + special bonuses
savingThrows.halfDamage: Many effects allow half damage on successful save

concentration.description: Required to maintain spell focus or activate spell-like abilities while threatened
concentration.check: 1d20 + spell level + caster's ability modifier (usually Int for wizards, Wis for clerics)
concentration.baseDC: 10 + damage taken or 10 + spell level of interfering spell (whichever is higher)
concentration.failure: Spell is lost and action is wasted

combatManeuvers.name: Aid Another
combatManeuvers.description: Help an ally with a check or attack
combatManeuvers.formula: Make skill check or attack roll of DC 10

combatManeuvers.name: Bull Rush
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier (opponent's CMB)
combatManeuvers.effect: Opponent is pushed back 5 feet per margin of success

combatManeuvers.name: Disarm
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. opponent's CMB
combatManeuvers.effect: Opponent's weapon falls to the ground nearby

combatManeuvers.name: Feint
combatManeuvers.description: Fake out opponent to deny Dex bonus
combatManeuvers.formula: Bluff check vs. opponent's Sense Motive
combatManeuvers.effect: Opponent is flat-footed against your next attack this round

combatManeuvers.name: Grapple
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. opponent's CMD
combatManeuvers.effect: Both grappler and target are grappled. Maintain grapple as move action each round.

combatManeuvers.name: Overrun
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. opponent's CMD
combatManeuvers.effect: You move through opponent's space and they are knocked prone

combatManeuvers.name: Sunder
combatManeuvers.description: Attack an opponent's weapon or item
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. target's hardness/AC
combatManeuvers.effect: Weapon takes damage; at 0 hp, it breaks

combatManeuvers.name: Throw
combatManeuvers.formula: Opposed CMB check (attacker's CMB vs. target's CMD)
combatManeuvers.effect: Target lands prone and takes falling damage

combatManeuvers.name: Trip
combatManeuvers.formula: 1d20 + BAB + Str modifier vs. opponent's CMD
combatManeuvers.effect: Opponent is knocked prone and can stand as a move action

specialActions.name: Full-Round Action
specialActions.description: Use your entire turn for one action

specialActions.name: Ready Action
specialActions.description: Prepare an action for a trigger
specialActions.mechanics: You specify a trigger and an action. When the trigger occurs, you act before the triggering opponent

specialActions.name: Charge
specialActions.description: Move up to twice your speed and make a single melee attack at -2 AC
specialActions.limitations: Must move in a straight line, can only make one melee attack

specialActions.name: Total Defense
specialActions.description: Gain +4 dodge bonus to AC this round
specialActions.tradeoff: Cannot attack or move more than 5 feet

specialActions.name: Withdraw
specialActions.description: Move up to twice your speed away from opponents
specialActions.restriction: Squares you vacate are not threatened; you can move away without provoking AoOs

environmentalHazards.name: Falling
environmentalHazards.save: Reflex DC 15 to take half damage (only if there's something to grab)
environmentalHazards.description: Taking falling damage requires safe movement checks. Unconscious creatures take full damage.

specialCases.featherFall: Spell negates fall damage and reduces falling speed
specialCases.acrobatics: DC equal to fall distance - 10, makes you only take damage as if falling 10 feet less

environmentalHazards.name: Drowning
environmentalHazards.effect: Can hold breath for 1 minute (Con score x 10 rounds). After that, takes 1 damage per round
environmentalHazards.save: Fortitude DC 10 to continue holding breath (when panicking)
environmentalHazards.description: Unconscious creatures begin drowning immediately. Water-breathing spells provide protection.
environmentalHazards.drowningRounds: At -1 hp, you're unconscious. At -10 hp, you're dead

environmentalHazards.name: Extreme Heat
environmentalHazards.save: Fail: 1d4 non-lethal damage + 1d4 for each previous hour
environmentalHazards.description: Extreme heat (120+ F) requires water and shade. Creatures without proper gear suffer penalties.
environmentalHazards.protection: Light clothing, shade, water, or cooling spells negate damage

environmentalHazards.name: Extreme Cold
environmentalHazards.save: Fail: 1d4 non-lethal damage + 1d4 for each previous hour
environmentalHazards.description: Extreme cold (0 F or below) requires shelter and warm clothing. Creatures take cumulative damage.
environmentalHazards.protection: Heavy clothing, shelter, fire, or warming spells negate damage

environmentalHazards.name: Starvation
environmentalHazards.effect: After 3 days without food, begins to starve. Takes 1d6 damage per day
environmentalHazards.save: Fortitude DC 10 each day to avoid damage progression
environmentalHazards.description: Creatures can go without food for 3 + Con modifier days. Endure Elements spells provide protection.
environmentalHazards.death: Creatures at 0 hp from starvation die if not fed immediately

environmentalHazards.name: Dehydration
environmentalHazards.effect: Without water, Constitution damage of 1d6 per day (harsh climate) or 1d4 per day (mild)
environmentalHazards.save: Fortitude DC 10 + 1 per previous check to avoid Constitution damage
environmentalHazards.description: Creatures need 1 gallon of water per day in normal conditions. Desert or extreme heat increases requirement.
environmentalHazards.progression: At Con 0, creature is unconscious and dying

environmentalHazards.name: Darkness
environmentalHazards.effect: Total concealment (50% miss chance, Dex-based creatures get +4 to hide checks)
environmentalHazards.description: Darkness is absolute without light sources or darkvision. Creatures with darkvision are unaffected.

environmentalHazards.name: Dense Fog/Mist
environmentalHazards.effect: Heavy concealment (20% miss chance beyond 5 feet, 50% beyond 30 feet)
environmentalHazards.description: Vision and ranged attacks are hampered. Creatures must move slowly to avoid getting lost.
environmentalHazards.navigation: Survival check to navigate without getting lost

environmentalHazards.name: Strong Wind
environmentalHazards.effect: Depends on wind strength (light breeze to hurricane force)
environmentalHazards.save: Fortitude to avoid being knocked prone or pushed back
environmentalHazards.description: Light wind: No effect. Moderate (31+ mph): -2 ranged, -2 Perception. Strong (51+ mph): Medium creatures prone, Large creatures -2, ranged impossible. Severe (75+ mph): All creatures prone, ranged impossible.

environmentalHazards.name: Poisonous Gas
environmentalHazards.effect: Varies by poison (usually Fortitude save DC varies)
environmentalHazards.save: Initial Fortitude save to resist initial effect, secondary save after 1 minute if exposed
environmentalHazards.description: Inhaled poisons require Fortitude saves each round in the poisoned area. Creatures can hold breath to resist.
environmentalHazards.progression: Depends on poison potency (1d2 damage per round to death in 1d4 rounds)

environmentalHazards.name: Acid Pool
environmentalHazards.effect: Immersion in acid deals 2d6 damage per round
environmentalHazards.save: Reflex to avoid falling in (DC 15), but still takes damage each round in it
environmentalHazards.description: Acid corrodes flesh, equipment, and even stone. Acid splash spell deals 1d3 damage.
environmentalHazards.equipment: Nonmagical equipment dissolves after 1d6 rounds in acid

weatherEffects.name: Light Rain
weatherEffects.effect: -2 to ranged attacks beyond 30 feet, visibility reduced
weatherEffects.penalties: No mechanical penalties beyond -2 ranged attack penalty

weatherEffects.name: Heavy Rain
weatherEffects.effect: -4 to ranged attacks, visibility severely reduced to 60 feet
weatherEffects.penalties: -4 ranged attacks, -2 Perception checks, movement costs 2x normal

weatherEffects.name: Thunderstorm
weatherEffects.effect: Severe visibility reduction, lightning strikes, extreme wind
weatherEffects.penalties: -4 ranged attacks, -4 Perception checks, movement costs 3x normal, risk of lightning strikes (treat as AOE spell 3d6 damage, DC 15 Ref for half)

weatherEffects.name: Snow
weatherEffects.effect: Visibility reduced, movement hampered, cold exposure
weatherEffects.penalties: Movement costs 2x normal (or 3x if heavy snow), -4 Perception checks, exposure to cold damage

weatherEffects.name: Blizzard
weatherEffects.effect: Extreme cold, near-zero visibility, dangerous wind
weatherEffects.penalties: Movement costs 4x normal, -8 Perception checks, 1d6 cold damage per minute, risk of getting lost

weatherEffects.name: Fog
weatherEffects.effect: Visibility reduced to 30 feet or less

weatherEffects.name: Dust Storm
weatherEffects.effect: Extreme concealment, wind hazard, visibility near zero
weatherEffects.penalties: -8 ranged attacks, -8 Perception checks, risk of being blown away (Fortitude DC 18 to stay in place)

terrainRules.specialRules: -4 Perception beyond 15 feet, movement must be careful
Climbing required, risk of falling, altitude effects
-2 ranged attacks uphill, +2 ranged attacks downhill
Heat exposure, limited water sources, mirages possible
Risk of sinking (Strength check DC 12), disease exposure, blood in water attracts creatures
Movement hampered, swimming required beyond waist depth, risk of drowning
Swimming required, oxygen/breathing requirements, pressure at extreme depth
Acrobatics DC 10 to move at normal speed, slipping risk, cold exposure
Climbing required in places, risk of unstable rubble collapsing
2d6 damage per round of contact, 1d6 at 5-foot distance (heat), spell-like protection required

lightingRules.visionRange: 60 feet for normal vision, further for darkvision creatures

lightingRules.penalties: -2 on Perception checks and ranged attacks beyond 30 feet
lightingRules.visionRange: Darkvision creatures see as if in bright light, others see 30 feet

lightingRules.penalties: -4 on Perception checks beyond 5 feet, ranged attacks at -4 beyond 5 feet
lightingRules.visionRange: Darkvision creatures see up to 60 feet, others are blind

lightingRules.concealment: 100% concealment (creatures cannot be seen even with light spells)
lightingRules.penalties: -8 on all checks, ranged attacks impossible, movement at -4 speed
lightingRules.visionRange: Even darkvision cannot pierce magical darkness

carryingCapacity.description: Carrying capacity is based on Strength score and is divided into load categories: light load, medium load, and heavy load.
carryingCapacity.baseFormula: Light load = Str score x 10 lbs. Medium load = Str score x 20 lbs. Heavy load = Str score x 30 lbs.

encumbranceEffects.mediumLoad: -3 penalty to Str and Dex skills
encumbranceEffects.heavyLoad: -6 penalty to Str and Dex skills, speed reduced by half, can only take move action or standard action, not both

helpfulRules.carryingUnusualItems: Use DM judgment for non-standard items
helpfulRules.totalWeightCarried: Add all equipped items, armor, weapons, and carried items together
helpfulRules.dragOrPull: Can drag/pull up to 1.5x heavy load at half speed

standard.name: Standard Action
examples: Make one melee or ranged attack

immediate.name: Immediate Action
immediate.note: Can use immediate action even when not your turn, but only once per round

fullRound.name: Full-Round Action
examples: Full attack with two-weapon fighting or multiple weapons
Activate two standard actions worth of ability
fullRound.costOfMoving: Only 5 feet of movement allowed with full-round action

freeAction.name: Free Action
examples: Use an ability that takes no action
freeAction.note: DM determines if action is truly free; typically 1-2 free actions per round

armorClass.formula: 10 + armor bonus + shield bonus + Dex modifier + deflection bonuses + natural armor + dodge bonuses + size modifier
armorClass.touchAC: Armor Class against touch attacks (no armor or natural armor bonuses). Used for ranged touch attacks.
armorClass.flatFootedAC: Armor Class when you're surprised or cannot use Dex modifier. No Dex bonus.

damageReduction.description: Subtract a fixed amount from all damage taken
damageReduction.format: DR X/type (e.g., DR 5/magic means 5 points reduction unless damage is from magic)
damageReduction.stackingRules: DR does not stack; use the highest applicable DR

immunities.description: Completely immune to certain damage types or effects

resistances.description: Reduce damage of a specific type by a set amount
resistances.format: Resistance 10 (fire) means reduce fire damage by 10 points per attack

spellSaveDC.formula: 10 + spell level + spellcaster's ability modifier (Int for wizards, Wis for clerics, Cha for sorcerers/paladins)
spellSaveDC.increaseFromMetamagic: Add +1 to DC per spell level adjustment from metamagic feats

spellResistance.description: Chance to resist spell effects entirely
spellResistance.check: 1d20 + caster level vs. target's spell resistance (10 + character level)
spellResistance.failure: Spell effect doesn't apply to that target

arcaneSpellFailure.description: Spellcasters in heavy armor take a chance their spell fails
arcaneSpellFailure.formula: Roll 1d100. If result is within the armor's arcane spell failure percentage, spell is wasted

concentrationChecks.dc: 10 + spell level of interfering spell or 10 + damage taken (whichever is higher)
